nasb.text: For the inhabitant of Maroth Becomes weak waiting for good, Because a calamity has come down from the Lord To the gate of Jerusalem.

esv.text: For the inhabitants of Maroth wait anxiously for good, because disaster has come down from the Lord to the gate of Jerusalem.

cnv.text: 瑪律的居民， 急待得著幸福， 因有災禍從耶和華那裡降下， 臨到耶路撒冷的城門。

ccb.text: 玛律的居民痛苦不堪， 渴望得到拯救， 因为耶和华已把灾难降到耶路撒冷的城门。
